overpayment_conditions.duplicate_billing: All attributes (Provider, Modifier, Units, DOS) match exactly for the same member and date.
overpayment_conditions.modifier_mismatch: Modifier QX billed with a non-matching direction modifier (other than QK).

explanation_templates.allowed: Provider billed QX and QK which are valid concurrent modifiers for Anesthesia.
explanation_templates.denied: Provider billed duplicate claims with identical attributes, which constitutes an overpayment.
explanation_templates.recovery: Recovery applied due to exact attribute match (same provider, modifier, units, dates).

synthetic_logic.valid_scenario: Scenario where QX and QK are billed correctly.
synthetic_logic.invalid_scenario_duplicate: Scenario where identical attributes are billed twice.
synthetic_logic.invalid_scenario_modifier: Scenario where an incorrect modifier is used.
